flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Endicott College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Endicott College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.6k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Endicott College are 2% above 6-year earnings ($57.3k → $58.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Endicott College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
